synopsis:
Following reports of the Jedi fugitive Tensu Run, the Inquisitor known as the Fifth Brother travels to the ruined world of Gerrigon, a planet laid to waste by a brutal civil war and never repopulated. Darth Vader warns him by hologram of Run's danger and the price of failure, while on Mustafar Vader reminds the Grand Inquisitor that all the Inquisitors will suffer if Run is not eliminated. Exploring the ruins, the Fifth Brother triggers a group of hostile derelict droids and cuts them down, then hears Tensu Run's taunting voice promising to meet him.

In a flashback, a younger Run and his master Elan Rast debate whether to fight the Empire's oppression or hold to Jedi ideals, and Run takes his master's warning about the dark side to heart. In the present, Run is ambushed in his docking ring by bandits led by Pii-lor, who had informed on him. Run defeats them but chooses mercy, disabling their ship with a grenade rather than killing Pii-lor, then jumps to hyperspace to confront the Inquisitor.

Run arrives at Gerrigon and the two duel with lightsabers. The Fifth Brother singes Run's shoulder, but Run recovers and severs the Inquisitor's left arm above the elbow. Defeated, the Fifth Brother asks to be finished, but Run spares him so that he can carry word to his masters that Tensu Run still lives.
title: Inquisitors #2
